dict.string: en
vivido
org.vivido.terminal
Vivido
APPL
vivido.icns
Vivido
NO
An application in Vivido would like to access AppleScript.
An application in Vivido would like to access calendar data.
An application in Vivido would like to access the camera.
An application in Vivido wants to access your contacts.
An application in Vivido would like to access your location information, even in the background.
An application in Vivido would like to access your location information.
An application in Vivido would like to access your location information while active.
An application in Vivido would like to access your microphone.
An application in Vivido would like to access your reminders.
An application in Vivido requires elevated permissions.
An application in Vivido wants to use Bluetooth.
